kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Screenshot On Failure will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to be executed when an AppiumLibrary keyword fails.

test.name: TC_M1.2_001 - Verify Sign Up Page UI Elements

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Skip
kw.msg: Manual test — UI comparison requires human judgment against Figma mockup
kw.arg: Manual test — UI comparison requires human judgment against Figma mockup
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.
kw.status: Manual test — UI comparison requires human judgment against Figma mockup

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify that all UI elements on the Sign Up page match the Figma mockup.
Pre-conditions: Mobile app is launched. Manual Test: UI visual verification requires human comparison against Figma designs.
test.status: Manual test — UI comparison requires human judgment against Figma mockup

test.name: TC_M1.2_011 - Verify User Can Login With Temporary Password And Reset It

kw.name: Skip
kw.msg: Requires freshly created account with temporary password — manual test run needed
kw.arg: Requires freshly created account with temporary password — manual test run needed
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.
kw.status: Requires freshly created account with temporary password — manual test run needed

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify user can login with the temporary password received via email, set a new permanent password, verify OTP, and login with the new password.
Pre-conditions: Account created; temporary password received via email.
test.status: Requires freshly created account with temporary password — manual test run needed

kw.name: Skip
kw.msg: Requires freshly created account with updated password — manual test run needed
kw.arg: Requires freshly created account with updated password — manual test run needed
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.
kw.status: Requires freshly created account with updated password — manual test run needed

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify user can login with new permanent credentials and land on the Home page.
Pre-conditions: User has successfully updated their password after account creation.
test.status: Requires freshly created account with updated password — manual test run needed

test.name: TC_M1.2_014 - Verify System Allows Email Reuse Under A Different Rural Bank

kw.name: Skip
kw.msg: Requires multi-bank environment configuration — cannot be automated in single-bank test env
kw.arg: Requires multi-bank environment configuration — cannot be automated in single-bank test env
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.
kw.status: Requires multi-bank environment configuration — cannot be automated in single-bank test env

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify that an email registered under one bank can be used to sign up under a different rural bank (cross-bank email reuse is allowed).
Pre-conditions: Email is already onboarded under San Antonio. Test environment must be pointing to a different bank (e.g., Abucay).
test.status: Requires multi-bank environment configuration — cannot be automated in single-bank test env

test.name: TC_M1.2_045 - Verify System Treats Email As Case-Insensitive During Onboarding And Password Reset

kw.name: Skip
kw.msg: Cross-flow E2E (Onboarding + Login + Password Reset) — Veriff requires physical device
kw.arg: Cross-flow E2E (Onboarding + Login + Password Reset) — Veriff requires physical device
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.
kw.status: Cross-flow E2E (Onboarding + Login + Password Reset) — Veriff requires physical device

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify the system normalises email casing so that: 1. Signup with a mixed-case email (e.g. "jjavier+CaseTest@nmblr.ai") succeeds. 2. First-time login using the uppercase/lowercase variant of the same email together with the temporary password also succeeds. 3. The password reset process completes and a confirmation is displayed.
Pre-conditions: AC_CASE_SIGNUP_EMAIL is NOT already registered.
NOTE: This is a cross-flow E2E test spanning Onboarding (M1.2), Login (M2.1), and Password Reset (M2.2). Veriff KYC is required to fully complete the onboarding leg — run on a PHYSICAL DEVICE. The login and password-reset legs can be verified independently using a pre-existing account whose signup email is known to be mixed-case.
test.status: Cross-flow E2E (Onboarding + Login + Password Reset) — Veriff requires physical device
